name: Leonardo.AI
tagline: Generative AI platform for game art, concept design, and creative content
description: Leonardo.AI empowers game creators to develop stylized and realistic imagery rapidly with AI-driven art generation. It's widely used in game development for concept art, texture creation, and marketing visuals, offering fine-tuned models and an intuitive interface for both indie developers and professional studios.
creator: Leonardo.AI

name: Promethean AI
tagline: AI-assisted environment design and world-building for games
description: Promethean AI is an AI assistant that automates world-building and environment design, 10x-ing digital art production speed. It helps game developers create detailed 3D environments by intelligently placing assets, generating terrain, and maintaining artistic coherence across vast virtual worlds.
creator: Promethean AI

name: NVIDIA ACE
tagline: Autonomous AI game characters with real-time conversational intelligence
description: NVIDIA ACE (Avatar Cloud Engine) is redefining game AI with autonomous game characters that go beyond conversational NPCs. Launched in major titles like inZOI and PUBG in 2025, ACE enables NPCs with real-time natural language understanding, adaptive behaviors, and local inference capabilities for lifelike in-game interactions.
creator: NVIDIA

name: Hidden Door
tagline: AI-powered interactive storytelling and role-playing game platform
description: Hidden Door launched in August 2025 as an immersive story game platform where roleplay meets fan fiction. It transforms iconic fictional worlds into explorable multiplayer RPGs using AI-generated dialogue, quests, and branching narratives, allowing players to create characters and stories that change everything.
creator: Hidden Door

name: Artificial Agency
tagline: Intelligent NPCs with memory, goals, and adaptive behaviors
description: Artificial Agency builds intelligent NPCs with memory, goals, and adaptive behaviors to create lifelike interactions in virtual worlds. Their AI characters remember past interactions, pursue dynamic objectives, and adapt their behavior based on player actions, enabling truly emergent gameplay experiences.
creator: Artificial Agency

name: Luma AI
tagline: Advanced 3D reconstruction from photos and videos for game assets
description: Luma AI provides advanced 3D reconstruction technology that creates detailed 3D models from photos or videos for easy game asset creation. It captures photorealistic scenes and objects using neural radiance fields (NeRF), enabling developers to digitize real-world environments and props for use in games.
creator: Luma AI

name: PLAN0 AI
tagline: AI-powered preconstruction cost intelligence for real estate developers
description: PLAN0 is a YC-backed AI platform that analyzes architectural plans using computer vision to generate detailed cost estimates in 30 minutes vs. 2+ weeks traditionally. It builds a proprietary database of real-time localized cost data and uses quant finance-inspired neural networks to predict trade-level costs up to 24 months out.
creator: PLAN0

name: Goldbridge
tagline: AI-powered banking platform for real estate owners
description: Goldbridge is building the financial operating system for real estate — the world's largest asset class. Backed by Y Combinator, it creates the first AI-powered banking platform for property owners, helping them optimize the $1T+ in rent flowing through landlord accounts annually and reduce billions in unnecessary property expenses.
creator: Goldbridge

name: Automax.ai
tagline: AI-native property appraisals using LiDAR and computer vision
description: Automax.ai is a YC-backed AI-native real estate appraisal firm that uses LiDAR and computer vision in its mobile app to capture property details automatically. AI agents generate complete, Fannie Mae & Freddie Mac compliant appraisal reports in under 20 minutes from start to finish, replacing a process that traditionally takes days.
creator: Automax.ai

name: PARES AI
tagline: All-in-one AI platform for commercial real estate brokers
description: PARES AI is the single platform commercial real estate brokers need for their entire workflow, from chasing leads to closing deals. Founded in 2025 and backed by Y Combinator, it features automatic CRM updates, target property lists with skip-tracing, an AI Underwriting Agent, and an AI Marketing Agent that creates OMs/BOVs in minutes.
creator: PARES AI

name: Propaya
tagline: AI-powered commercial lease abstraction and analysis
description: Propaya uses AI to instantly abstract and analyze commercial leases, delivering clause-cited insights, linked schedules, and export-ready data in minutes. It empowers brokers, heads of real estate, and attorneys with market benchmarks and deal evaluation tools to negotiate more effectively and efficiently.
creator: Propaya

name: Assembly HOA
description: Assembly is an AI-native HOA management company on a mission to fix homeowner associations. Combining professional expertise with intelligent software, it automates routine tasks, simplifies day-to-day operations, and delivers the right knowledge at the right time to make communities run smoothly and decisions easier.
creator: Assembly HOA

name: InLoop Robotics
tagline: AI-native warehouse fulfillment powered by robotics
description: InLoop Robotics is building AI-native fulfillment powered by robotics — warehouses without human labor that get better, faster, and cheaper with every order. Backed by Y Combinator, it ships imperfect policies into real warehouses, detects failures in real time, and uses every intervention as training data for continuous improvement.
creator: InLoop Robotics

name: Haladir
description: Haladir is the operational AI layer for logistics, unifying data across WMS, TMS, and OMS systems while embedding solver-grade optimization and reinforcement learning. Backed by Y Combinator with $4.3M raised, it defines operational superintelligence as AI that consistently makes maximally-optimal decisions in complex supply chain environments.
creator: Haladir

name: Lunavo
tagline: AI assistant that runs carrier operations end-to-end
description: Lunavo is the AI assistant for carriers, plugging directly into existing toolstacks to understand processes and monitor all incoming data and requests. It runs end-to-end backoffice operations, handling repetitive tasks, resolving issues autonomously, and escalating only what matters — helping carriers scale operations without scaling headcount.
creator: Lunavo

name: Norra
tagline: AI-powered medical equipment tracking for nursing facilities
description: Norra helps nursing facilities manage equipment operations using physical trackers and AI agents to eliminate $15 billion in annual equipment waste. Every year ~$80 billion is spent on medical equipment like beds, concentrators, and wheelchairs, yet facilities operate with zero visibility — Norra solves this with AI-driven tracking and optimization.
creator: Norra

name: ShipBob
tagline: AI-powered global fulfillment platform for ecommerce brands
description: ShipBob is a leading global fulfillment and supply chain platform for SMB and Mid-Market ecommerce brands, leveraging AI for real-time analytics, inventory optimization, and omnichannel management. With 50+ fulfillment centers across the US, Canada, Europe, and Australia, it provides brands a single view of their business and customers.
creator: ShipBob

name: Nuvocargo
tagline: AI-powered cross-border logistics platform for North America
description: Nuvocargo is the all-in-one digital platform for cross-border trade, recognized as one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies 2025. Its AI-powered NuvoOS platform centralizes multi-product logistics across North America, making cross-border shipping more transparent using AI despite tariff complexities.
creator: Nuvocargo
